speaker: speaker1
text: I have a complaint to make . The bill you sent me was incorrect . What's more , it isn't the first time

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I must apologize , madam . We have new computers here , you know .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't you think it's about time you got them working properly ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I agree entirely . I assure you it won't happen again .
